title: Manhattan Borough President — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across the Office of the Manhattan Borough President (MBPO) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the MBPO Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us, agency label 'Manhattan Borough President (MBPO)'), the WordPress/Divi site at manhattanbp.nyc.gov, and the office's discretionary-funding, land-use, appointment, and constituent-service functions. Includes the NYC geography spine, a fiscal-year helper, and an organization reference used across the grant/award datasets. The office is borough-scoped (Manhattan), so the Borough enum is retained for cross-borough joins back to the rest of city government.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across MBPO datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government. Manhattan has 12 community boards (districts 1–12).

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('NTA').

Money.description: A US dollar amount (award, allocation, or request), normalized from the varied per-year column names ('Funded Amount', 'FY Award', 'ALLOCATION', 'RECOMMENDED FUNDING').

OrganizationReference.description: A recipient/appointing organization referenced across the grant, award, and appointment datasets.
